sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67606" key="mhtruiw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μητρυι-ώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n67606.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">step-motherly</tr_>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ μ.</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a stepmother's treatment, unkindness</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.143a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
